title: Valero Energy (VLO) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say

title: Valero (VLO) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
text: Increased renewable diesel sales volumes and declining costs of sales aid Valero's (VLO) earnings in Q2.

title: Valero Energy (VLO) Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Valero Energy (VLO) came out with quarterly earnings of $5.40 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $5.08 per share. This compares to earnings of $11.36 per share a year ago.

title: Refiner Valero's quarterly profit slumps on margins hit
text: Refiner Valero Energy Corp reported a slump in second-quarter profit as improved fuel supplies and slowing economic activity compressed margins.

title: Valero Energy Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO, “Valero”) today reported net income attributable to Valero stockholders of $1.9 billion, or $5.40 per share, for the second quarter of 2023, compared to $4.7 billion, or $11.57 per share, for the second quarter of 2022. Excluding the adjustments shown in the accompanying earnings release tables, adjusted net income attributable to Valero stockholders was $4.6 billion, or $11.36 per share, for the second quarter of 2022. title: Valero Has Strong Refining Growth Potential
text: Valero Energy Corporation is focused on both an incredibly strong core business with substantial value-add, along with a growing renewable business. The company has more than 3 million barrels/day in its core business, generating incredibly strong margins in the most recent quarter. The company has a long history of shareholder returns in a variety of scenarios, and we expect that to continue, given the company's manageable debt load.

title: Energy Stocks Bullish, But Futures Market Signals Trouble Ahead
text: The Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund NYSEARCA: XLE was trading higher for the fifth session in a row on July 24, extending that streak with a gap up at the open.

title: Dirt Cheap - Why I'm Buying Valero Ahead Of Earnings
text: Valero Energy is a compelling choice for dividend investors due to its strong position in the refining industry and its ability to generate consistent shareholder value. The company is experiencing healthy industry fundamentals with high refinery utilization rates and strong demand for gasoline and distillate fuels. Looking ahead to the upcoming 2Q23 earnings, the company is expected to generate strong earnings, further supporting its undervaluation and potential for dividend growth.

title: Vectoring In On Valero Energy
text: Today, we put the largest North American refiner, Valero Energy, in the spotlight. The shares appear cheap on some valuation metrics and also pay better than a three percent dividend yield. The stock has been range bound, setting up a potential covered call trade. An investment analysis follows below.

title: Valero Energy Corporation Declares Regular Cash Dividend on Common Stock
text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO, “Valero”) has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend on common stock of $1.02 per share. The dividend is payable on September 5, 2023 to holders of record at the close of business on August 3, 2023. title: Valero Announces Promotion of Gary K. Simmons to Chief Operating Officer
text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO, “Valero”) announced today that Gary K. Simmons, Valero's Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, has been promoted and elected by the Board of Directors as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Valero, effective July 20, 2023. title: 3 Boring Stocks That You Should Buy and Hold Forever
